disconnect.mcgatekeeper.session_already_: A verify'd session for thy account doth already existeth
disconnect.mcgatekeeper.new_connection: Sever'd: a new verify'd connection hath been made from thy account
screen.mcgatekeeper.title: McGatekeeper - Key Governance
screen.mcgatekeeper.warning: Heed this warning: exported scrolls contain private keys — guard them well.
screen.mcgatekeeper.clear_confirm_body: This doth remove all saved keypairs. Thou wilt need to re-authorise on each server.
screen.mcgatekeeper.delete_confirm_body: This doth remove the saved keypair for %s. Thou wilt not be able to enter that server until an admin doth grant thee leave once more.
